global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on financial clarity.
global.main_message: Promoting transparent financial services with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top that reads 'Your money, clearer'.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that states 'No hidden fees'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Start now' centered at the bottom.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner featuring the text 'SwiftStack' in a simple font.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: An abstract arrangement of geometric shapes in light purple tones, adding visual interest.
